chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 116 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.546/2020 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 06-10-2021 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Aamir Mustafa Kamario, Advocate for respondents No.3 to 5. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statement has been filed on behalf of respondent No.4, wherein it is stated that the case of the petitioner pertains to some fake / bogus appointment, hence, the matter has been referred to Scrutiny Committee as per orders of the Chief Secretary Sindh. In the circumstances, this petition is disposed of with pending application by directing the petitioner to approach the Scrutiny Committee and satisfy as to his appointment. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
